description: Provision a new read-only SOC analyst account using the Wazuh REST API at https://localhost:55000 (Admin: wazuh-wui, Password: MyS3cr37P450r.*-). Create a security policy named 'readonly_agents' that allows 'agent:read' and 'group:read' actions on 'agent:id:*' and 'group:id:*' resources. Create a security role named 'soc_analyst_readonly' linked to this policy. Create a user named 'analyst_jsmith' (Password: S0cAn4lyst!2024) and assign the 'soc_analyst_readonly' role to them. Verify the configuration by authenticating as the new user and saving the resulting JSON authentication response to /home/ga/rbac_verification.json.
